panels.title: Sensor freshness — seconds since last reading (device × field)
panels.description: Each cell = seconds since that device's field last arrived. A red cell with green neighbours = that sensor dropped (e.g. BH1750 lux); a whole red row = the device is offline. New devices add rows, new sensors add columns automatically. Thresholds align with the controller's STALE=5min.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air" and r.device != "sim")
  |> group(columns: ["device", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: int(v: now()) - int(v: r._time)) / 1000000000.0 }))
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["device", "_field", "_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["device"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air" and r._field == "temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air" and r._field == "hum")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air" and r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air" and r._field == "gas")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air" and (r._field == "lux" or r._field == "lux_ref"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)

panels.title: DLI — daily light integral (mol/m²/day, estimated from lux)
panels.description: Estimated Daily Light Integral, last 7 days. PPFD ≈ lux/54 (daylight-spectrum approximation — NOT a true PAR measurement; an AS7341 spectral sensor would give real PAR). Integrated per local (Asia/Taipei) day. Underestimates across lux dropouts; today's bar is partial.

targets.query:
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: "Asia/Taipei")

from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air" and r._field == "lux")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 54.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: (tables=<-, column) => tables |> integral(unit: 1s), createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1000000.0 }))
  |> yield(name: "DLI")

panels.title: AS7341 ambient spectrum (latest, raw counts by wavelength)
panels.description: Latest AS7341 8-channel visible spectrum (f415 violet → f680 red, nm), raw ADC counts. Shows the spectral shape of ambient light. Single device (staging-01) for now. Raw counts are gain/integration-time dependent; useful for relative shape, not absolute irradiance.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sensors")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spectrum" and r.mode == "ambient" and r._field =~ /^f[0-9]+$/)
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["_field", "_value"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_field"])
